allow: Bash(if [ -f "c:/Users/Ron/.claude/projects/c--Users-Ron-OneDrive-3D-Druck-SimRacing-Turn-R8-LMS-DIY-Files-TechEddy-ESP-SimHub-GT-Wheel---Test-ESP-SimHub-main/memory/MEMORY.md" ]; then cat "c:/Users/Ron/.claude/projects/c--Users-Ron-OneDrive-3D-Druck-SimRacing-Turn-R8-LMS-DIY-Files-TechEddy-ESP-SimHub-GT-Wheel---Test-ESP-SimHub-main/memory/MEMORY.md"; else echo "NOT FOUND"; fi)

PowerShell(Get-PnpDevice -Class Ports -Status OK | ForEach-Object { $_ | Get-PnpDeviceProperty -KeyName 'DEVPKEY_Device_BusReportedDeviceDesc','DEVPKEY_Device_InstanceId' | Select-Object @{N='Port';E={$_.PSParentPath.Split\('\\'\)[-1]}}, KeyName, Data } | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-PnpDevice -Class Ports -Status OK | Where-Object { $_.FriendlyName -match "USB" } | ForEach-Object { $name = $_.FriendlyName; $desc = \($_ | Get-PnpDeviceProperty -KeyName 'DEVPKEY_Device_BusReportedDeviceDesc'\).Data; [PSCustomObject]@{Port=$name; Device=$desc} })
